data.content:
The file is generated successfully (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`), but it's never added to the `Compile` item group, so the compiler doesn't know about it.

The fix is to include the generated file in compilation via `<Compile Include>` inside the target:

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but the generated file is never added to the `Compile` item group. The MSBuild compilation doesn't know about it.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` items within the target, using `<ItemGroup>` with a `<Compile Include="..." />` entry after writing the file.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

  </Target>", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation -->

      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds and the app runs correctly.

**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote `GeneratedInfo.cs` to disk but never told MSBuild to compile it. The generated file needs to be added to the `<Compile>` item group within the target so the compiler picks it up.

**Fix:** Added a `<Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />` inside the target, after the file is written. This registers the generated source with the C# compiler.
